subcodes.first_line: O Sayfu'llah! The necks have grown long in hypocrisy, but God hath forbidden the decree of the sword and ordained its station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سیف الله قد طالت الاعناق بالنفاق ولکن الله نهی حکم السیف و قدر مقامه
subcodes.subjects: @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
